nasb.text: Then you will cry out in that day because of your king whom you have chosen for yourselves, but the Lord will not answer you in that day.”

esv.text: And in that day you will cry out because of your king, whom you have chosen for yourselves, but the Lord will not answer you in that day.”

cnv.text: 到時，你們必因你們為自己揀選的王而哀求，那時耶和華卻不應允你們。”

ccb.text: 将来你们会因所选之王的压迫而呼求耶和华，耶和华却不会垂听你们。”
